column3: Bought shortly after the first job with Jackie.

Best ripperdoc in Watson, Night City veteran, old friend to Jackie Welles

You already know the rest – the heist went tits up, biochip ended up in my head... Lost my best friend Jackie along with the rest of the crew. Would've met the same fate if the Relic hadn't "resurrected" me. 'Course, nothing's for free. Coming back from the dead came with the ticking time bomb named Johnny Silverhand. That's the universe's sick sense of humor for ya...
Jackie... Who was he? What was he like?

Oh, man... Jackie would've loved you. And vice versa, I think. He was the kind of guy who'd never leave you hanging, never try to rip you off, never let you get hurt... He had this amazing laugh and these god-awful jokes, and he'd often let himself get carried away by some pipe dream... Sometimes it pissed me off, but now I just miss him so goddamn much... Jackie was the best friend I ever had. He was like family to me.

The thing you have to know about Jackie is that Jackie dreamt big, and his dreams infected everyone around him. OK, granted, if a streetpunk gave him one wrong look, they'd get the beatdown of the century, but he also had this strange kind of warmth, an energy that just made him glow. When you were next to him, you felt unstoppable, that everything would work out, because shit was just meant to be... When Jackie was there, I felt indestructible. Can't say I feel the same way now...

No shortage of big dreamers in Night City, is there? I'm guessing more than once you two hatched plans to bring NC to its knees over some cold brews? ;) This just gets me thinking... maybe if I met you earlier, my life would have turned out differently. I tried going up against that city, completely alone, with no one at my side to give a damn about what I wanted or why. Shit, I didn't even know what I wanted... That's why it's good to have people like Jackie around. I'm glad you told me about him :)

I just remembered this one time with Jackie when he swore that if he wanted to, he could become a master sushi chef (because I said using chopsticks was probably his life's greatest achievement). Know what he did? He walked up to this joint in Kabuki and asked for a job – said his futomaki was second to none. They hired him on the spot. Course, three days later they fired him because he kept eating whatever he tried to make. But that's Jackie for ya – one look at him and you knew he was true to his word. You trusted him and gave him a chance :)
Wait for Jackie in the elevator.
Drink to Jackie with the bouncer.

Legend\n\nNight City craved another legend and it got one. Who isn't tired of hearing about the great Morgan Blackhand? Well now there's a new name on everybody's lips. Wonder what Jackie would have to say about that... or Johnny.

Game On\n\nLooks like Dex DeShawn's tossed the ball in our court... but scoring a pro fixer is only half the battle. In this biz it's either go big or go home and this is our one chance to shine. With Jackie at your side, what could go wrong?

Reputation\n\nBy now fixers in Night City know who to count on. Higher street cred means sweeter gigs, but not everyone'll be toasting to your success. Fame brings with it enemies, but as Jackie would've said: "Ain't got time for no Tarot mumbo jumbo shit! Vamos!" And he would've been damn right.
Did V learn that Jackie was soulkilled?

It's not necessary to hide bodies in a disposal device. Often it's enough to just put it out of enemy sight.\nPick up the body and drop it in the  corner of the room next to Jackie to avoid detection.

Jackie, my man!
You won't believe your luck – a collector's selling a beauty in preem condition. Price is good, if a 'lil over your budget.
Lemme know if you're interested, cuz if you aren't, it'll go to someone else.
Peace,
Sid

My oh my, Jackie-boy... you've really outdone yourself this time. I spy with my little eye... a delicious bounty on your head and a lot of gonks who'd like a taste of it. I know, I know, the cooldown's tough, so let me spare you the endless wait with a little present. Take one puff – a day goes by. Two puffs – a whole week. It's like pressing the fast-forward button, except more fun. Don't worry about the money, you can pay me back when the dust settles. I have a few specimens I'd like to introduce you to... if you catch my drift. Get some rest, my dearest choom, and we'll play later.\nBM
I found something that belonged to Jackie... I think he would have wanted you to have it. It's waiting in front of your apartment.

I don't usually give advice, but... fuck it, here goes. Don't make the same mistake I made – say goodbye to the people you love. You know what I mean, right? Jackie Welles was your best choom, and you don't find a lot of straight-up peeps like that in NC. Best thing you can do is remember them. Oh, and one more thing. If anyone asks, I didn't just say all that to you. Got it?

A proud son of Heywood and an even prouder son of Mama Welles. Jackie's stubborn – when he wants something, he won't stop (or shut up about it) until he gets his hands on it. Jackie always wanted a lot out of life – maybe too much.\n\nAs a teenager, he joined the Valentinos gang, but realizing how much he was capable of – he quit. For years he hustled through the unforgiving world of mercwork, because you need more than a go-getter attitude to sit at the big boys' table – you need street cred. Jackie's life goal has always been to become a legend at the Afterlife and make a heap of eddies along the way.
